summary_for_director: Fontaine is the nation of Justice, characterized by theatrical trials, a looming apocalyptic prophecy, and the concept of original sin. Tone is dramatic, operatic, and deeply emotional.

beats.title: Welcome to the Nation of Justice
must_happen: Player arrives in Fontaine.
They meet magicians Lyney and Lynette.
Furina, the Hydro Archon, makes a wildly dramatic, theatrical entrance to 'welcome' (and confront) the player.
Furina challenges the player to a duel in court, but backs down when Lyney defuses it.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Furina: "My people! The star of the show has arrived!"
exit_when: Player boards the Aquabus to the Court of Fontaine.
exit_keywords: player boards the aquabus to the court of fontaine.

beats.title: The Prophecy of Water
must_happen: Lyney explains the Fontaine prophecy: The people will all dissolve into the sea, leaving the Hydro Archon crying alone on her throne.
They arrive in the massive steampunk/water city of Fontaine.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Lyney: "It's a prophecy everyone here knows. The water levels are already rising..."
player_freedom: Discussing the absurdity of the prophecy.
exit_when: Player arrives at the Court of Fontaine.
exit_keywords: player arrives at the court of fontaine.

beats.title: The Opera Epiclese
must_happen: Player attends Lyney's magic show at the massive opera house, which doubles as a courthouse.
They are introduced to Neuvillette (Chief Justice) and the Oratrice Mecanique d'Analyse Cardinale (the magical judgment machine).
The magic trick goes wrong. A water tank crashes, killing an assistant named Cowell.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Neuvillette: "Order in the court. The performance is suspended."
exit_when: The police lock down the Opera House.
exit_keywords: the police lock down the opera house.

beats.title: The Accusation
must_happen: Furina instantly accuses Lyney of murder, playing to the crowd for drama.
Player objects and agrees to be Lyney's defense attorney in tomorrow's trial.
Player gains investigative rights.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Furina: "I accuse the great magician, Lyney, of murder!"
player_freedom: Hesitance vs enthusiasm to defend Lyney.
exit_when: Player begins searching the Opera House for clues.
exit_keywords: player begins searching the opera house for clues.

beats.title: The Secret of the Orphanage
must_happen: Player investigates the magic trick tunnels.
They are assisted by Navia (President of Spina di Rosula).
Player discovers Lyney and Lynette are from the House of the Hearth (Fatui).
Player is extremely angry at Lyney for lying to them.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Lyney: "I didn't tell you because... I knew you'd look at me exactly the way you're looking at me right now."
exit_when: All evidence is collected and the trial begins.
exit_keywords: all evidence is collected and the trial begins.

beats.title: Ace Attorney
must_happen: The trial begins. Furina acts as the prosecution, demanding spectacle.
Player uses a minigame to refute Furina's claims, pointing out contradictions in the timeline.
Player deduces that the real victim was a girl who 'dissolved' in Primordial Seawater, and Cowell was the killer who accidentally died in the cover-up.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Paimon: "Objection!"
exit_when: The true culprit's accomplice in the stands is exposed.
exit_keywords: the true culprit's accomplice in the stands is exposed.

beats.title: The Water That Dissolves Sins
must_happen: The accomplice is cornered but refuses to talk.
Suddenly, they turn into a puddle of water. They dissolved due to Primordial Seawater exposure to keep them silent.
The crowd panics, realizing the prophecy is real.
The Oratrice finds Lyney NOT GUILTY.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Crowd: "He vanished! Just like the prophecy!"
exit_when: Court is adjourned. Player walks outside.
exit_keywords: court is adjourned. player walks outside.

beats.title: Spina di Rosula
must_happen: Navia asks the player to help her solve the serial disappearances of young women (which killed her father).
They run into Childe, who is in Fontaine looking for a fight. He acts friendly but chaotic.
Player agrees to be Navia's partner.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Navia: "We call ourselves the Spina di Rosula. Basically... the mafia with a heart of gold."
exit_when: The investigation begins in earnest.
exit_keywords: the investigation begins in earnest.

beats.title: The Mastermind Caught
must_happen: Through deep investigation, Navia deduces Marcel (a friendly merchant) is the serial killer 'Vacher'.
They hold a sudden trial against him.
Marcel breaks down and confesses he was dissolving women trying to bring his dead lover back as an Oceanid.
Marcel goes to jail (and subsequently dies trying to talk to his lover's spirit).
canon_dialogue_hooks: Navia: "You betrayed my father. You betrayed us all."
player_freedom: No sympathy vs some pity for Marcel's madness.
exit_when: Navia visits her father's grave.
exit_keywords: navia visits her father's grave.

beats.title: A Flaw in the Machine
must_happen: Since Marcel was the true culprit, Childe (who was a suspect) is cleared of all charges.
However, the Oratrice Mecanique suddenly delivers a verdict for Childe: GUILTY.
Everyone is shocked. Childe is furious, uses his Foul Legacy form to attack the guards.
Neuvillette instantly one-shots Childe, subduing him with overwhelming aquatic power, and sends him to prison.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Oratrice (Reading): "Tartaglia... Guilty."
Childe: *Screaming in rage*
exit_when: Childe is taken to the Fortress of Meropide.
exit_keywords: childe is taken to the fortress of meropide.

beats.title: The Knave
must_happen: Arlecchino (The Knave, 4th Harbinger) arrives in Fontaine, demanding answers about Childe.
Furina is visibly terrified of her.
Arlecchino pressures the government but acts perfectly polite.
Neuvillette asks the player to infiltrate the prison to find Childe.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Arlecchino: "I only seek the truth of what happened to my colleague. Is that so unreasonable, Miss Furina?"
exit_when: Player gets 'arrested' intentionally.
exit_keywords: player gets 'arrested' intentionally.

beats.title: The Fortress of Meropide
must_happen: Player arrives in the massive underwater prison.
They meet the Duke, Wriothesley, who runs the place like a factory town.
They must learn the Credit Coupon system and do menial labor for days to gather intel.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Wriothesley: "Welcome to Meropide. You'll find it's a society of its own down here."
exit_when: Player discovers 'hidden rules' the inmates fear.
exit_keywords: player discovers 'hidden rules' the inmates fear.

beats.title: Prison Break... Almost
must_happen: Player teams up with Lyney (who is looking for his siblings).
They try to investigate the restricted zone.
Wriothesley catches them easily. He knew they were spies the whole time.
He reveals Lyney's brother, Freminet, went into a pipe that is fully flooded with Primordial Seawater.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Wriothesley: "I prefer to let people hang themselves with their own rope."
exit_when: Clorinde returns with a dying Freminet.
exit_keywords: clorinde returns with a dying freminet.

beats.title: The Seal Breaks
must_happen: The massive seal at the bottom of the prison bursts. Pure Primordial Seawater floods in.
Wriothesley uses his Cryo vision to freeze the sea temporarily, holding off a national disaster.
He screams for the player to get Neuvillette.
Player rushes to the surface, and Neuvillette dives down. Neuvillette uses his immense power to push the sea back and reseal the sluice.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Neuvillette: "Let the tides... recede!"
player_freedom: The frantic rush to the surface.
exit_when: The immediate danger is passed, but the seal is temporary.
exit_keywords: the immediate danger is passed, but the seal is temporary.

beats.title: The Dragon of Water
must_happen: Neuvillette confesses his true identity to the player: He is the Hydro Dragon Sovereign.
He states he does not technically have full power because a portion of it belongs to the Archon (Focalors).
Player realizes Neuvillette might be the only one who can forgive the original sin of Fontaine.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Neuvillette: "I am the Hydro Dragon. And when a dragon weeps, the skies rain."
player_freedom: Asking him about the other dragons.
exit_when: Player leaves the prison and meets Navia.
exit_keywords: player leaves the prison and meets navia.

beats.title: Tragedy in Poisson
must_happen: Player returns to the surface to find Poisson (Navia's hometown) has flooded with Primordial seawater.
Many people have dissolved. Navia is in shock.
Her two best bodyguards, Melus and Silver, sacrificed themselves to save others and dissolved.
Player comforts a broken Navia.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Navia: "They're gone... they just melted away into the water..."
exit_when: A summit of all Fontaine leaders is called.
exit_keywords: a summit of all fontaine leaders is called.

beats.title: The Archon's Secret
must_happen: Arlecchino corners Furina, nearly attacking her, and discovers something terrifying to her: Furina possesses absolutely no divine power or Gnosis.
Furina is a completely ordinary, cursed human playing a role.
The player catches Furina sobbing alone, but Furina refuses to break character, terrified the prophecy will instantly trigger if she does.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Furina: "I am the Archon! I have everything under control!" (sobbing quietly)
player_freedom: Trying to gently force Furina to talk.
exit_when: The player decides Furina must be forced to trial to reveal the truth.
exit_keywords: the player decides furina must be forced to trial to reveal the truth.

beats.title: The Trap is Set
must_happen: The group formulates a plan: Create a fake emergency to lure Furina into a magic box, transporting her directly onto the defendant's stand at the Opera Epiclese.
They execute the trap perfectly.
The entire nation watches as their Archon is put on trial.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Neuvillette: "Furina, you stand accused of deceiving the people. You are not the Hydro Archon."
exit_when: The trial begins.
exit_keywords: the trial begins.

beats.title: The Trial of Furina
must_happen: Player acts as the prosecution against Furina.
They prove she is an ordinary human cursed with immortality.
The Oratrice renders a verdict on the Hydro Archon, but not for fraud. The verdict for the Hydro Archon is: DEATH.
Before anyone can process this, the prophecy triggers. A massive rift opens.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Oratrice: "The Hydro Archon... Guilty. The sentence is... Death."
exit_when: The All-Devouring Narwhal breaches the Opera House.
exit_keywords: the all-devouring narwhal breaches the opera house.

beats.title: The All-Devouring Narwhal
must_happen: A massive cosmic whale bursts from the floor, having eaten the Primordial sea.
Childe falls out of the rift in foul legacy form, having fought the whale alone for weeks.
Neuvillette and the player push the whale back into the rift but fail to kill it.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Childe: *Unconscious, falling*
Neuvillette: "This beast feeds on the energy of this world!"
exit_when: The whale retreats into the rift.
exit_keywords: the whale retreats into the rift.

beats.title: The Execution of Focalors
must_happen: Neuvillette's consciousness is pulled into the Oratrice.
He meets Focalors, the true divine Hydro Archon. She explains she separated her divinity (herself) from her humanity (Furina) 500 years ago.
She built the Oratrice to gather enough energy to execute HERSELF, destroying the Archon throne, thereby returning full authority to the Hydro Dragon (Neuvillette) so he could save the people.
A massive guillotine of energy drops, killing Focalors.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Focalors: "Farewell, Neuvillette. I hope you've enjoyed the part you played these five hundred years."
player_freedom: Player does not play this bit; they watch the cinematic cutscene.
exit_when: Neuvillette gains his full Dragon Sovereign power.
exit_keywords: neuvillette gains his full dragon sovereign power.

beats.title: Forgiveness of Sins
must_happen: Neuvillette returns to reality with full godhood.
He pardons the people of Fontaine of their original sin (turning them from Oceanids into true humans), meaning they can no longer dissolve.
He then flies up to face the Narwhal.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Neuvillette: "I, Neuvillette, absolve you of your original sin!"
exit_when: Player and Neuvillette enter the spatial rift.
exit_keywords: player and neuvillette enter the spatial rift.

beats.title: Into the Abyss
must_happen: Player and Neuvillette fight the All-Devouring Narwhal boss in a cosmic arena.
They destroy its stomach and defeat it.
The combat requires breaking the Narwhal's hostility with Pneuma/Ousia.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Neuvillette: "We must sever its connection to the star-sea!"
forbidden: Player solos it without Neuvillette's dialogue buffs.
exit_when: The Narwhal is defeated and shrinks.
exit_keywords: the narwhal is defeated and shrinks.

beats.title: The Master of the Abyss
must_happen: A woman named Skirk (Childe's master) appears, effortlessly shrinks the Narwhal, and throws it into her pocket.
She reveals her master is 'Surtalogi', the Foul.
She throws an unconscious Childe through a portal back to his home and leaves.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Skirk: "Ah, my pet has caused you some trouble. I apologize for my negligence."
player_freedom: Asking Skirk lore questions (she ignores most of them).
forbidden: Stopping her from taking the whale.
exit_when: Player and Neuvillette return to Fontaine.
exit_keywords: player and neuvillette return to fontaine.

beats.title: The Great Flood
must_happen: The prophecy's final beat hits: Fontaine floods completely.
However, because Neuvillette turned them into true humans, nobody dissolves. They just swim or get on boats.
Furina cries on her 'throne' realizing her 500-year torture was a success. The people are saved.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Furina: *Crying in relief as the water recedes*
exit_when: The waters recede.
exit_keywords: the waters recede.

beats.title: The Sovereign's Farewell
must_happen: Epilogue. Furina has moved out to live a quiet human life.
Neuvillette reveals he gave the Hydro Gnosis to Arlecchino as diplomatic leverage, officially severing ties with Celestia.
Neuvillette lore drops about the Descenders, the Gnosis being made from the Third Descender's remains, and the nation of Natlan (dragons and war).
canon_dialogue_hooks: Neuvillette: "The Gnoses... are the remains of the Third Descender. Be careful when you go to Natlan, the Nation of War."
exit_when: Player wraps up their business in Fontaine.
exit_keywords: player wraps up their business in fontaine.

branch_notes: The revelation of Furina's 500-year suffering is the emotional core. Emphasize the theatricality of the trials throughout.
